payload.claim_boundary: Semantic gates passed. No performance target or release-readiness claim is made until the frozen paired comparison and independent validation run.

diff_summary.detail: Made seven ExecutionContextImpl lifecycle collections optional with direct first-mutation allocation and added seedTags fast paths that preserve tag precedence without unconditional Set and array allocations.

payload.required_sentence: DKRs are discovery-worker scopes; PKRs are progression-worker execution units; there is no CKR worker.
payload.workspace_effect: One uncommitted product file changed. Existing OKRA and workers paths were not altered by the product edit.
